song.title: Jesus Savior Son of God
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, Savior, Son of God, Bearer of the sinner’s load, Breaker of the captive’s chain, Cleanser of the guilty’s stain,
[V2] 2) Thou the sinner’s death hast died, Thou for us was crucified; For our sins Thy flesh was torn, Thou our penalty hast borne.
[V3] 3) Savior, Surety, Lamb of God, Thou hast bought us with Thy blood; Thou hast wiped the debt away, Nothing left for us to pay;
[V4] 4) Nothing left for us to bear, Nothing left for us to share But the pardon and the bliss, But the love, the light, the peace.
[V5] 5) I to Thee will look and live, And, in looking, praises give; Looking lightens, looking heals, Looking all the gladness seals.
[v6] 6) Jesus, Savior, Son of God, Bearer of the sinner’s load, I would rise to Thee above, I would look, and praise, and love.
song.author: Bickersteth
